channel.title: PNallDR
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from PNallDR, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: Mamdami marks Pride Month, says honoring queer and transgender contributions would take more than 30 days
item.description: New York City Mayor Zohran Mamdani suggested that recognizing the contributions of LGBT New Yorkers would require more than one month.

item.title: Platner still has active account on anonymous app dubbed predator's paradise amid cheating scandal
item.description: Democratic Senate candidate Graham Platner maintains an active Kik account with a suggestive photo despite scrutiny over alleged infidelity.

item.title: Another NATO ally signs onto European nuclear umbrella as continent boosts self-defense
item.description: Norway becomes the ninth country to join France's nuclear deterrence initiative as European nations seek greater defense autonomy from the U.S.

item.title: US to drastically slash number of embassies in Africa that can process visas
item.description: The State Department plans to significantly reduce the number of U.S. embassies and consulates in Africa authorized to process visas for foreigners.
